description_long: This is a mid-century modern wooden sideboard cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and a rectangular silhouette. The front features a combination of a single vertical door on the left and two horizontal drawers on the right, each with subtle integrated handles. The cabinet stands on four tapered legs, giving it a slightly elevated and elegant appearance. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, adding a natural texture and warmth to the piece. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible ornamentation or glass panels. This type of cabinet is suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies, and can store a variety of items out of sight.
description: A dark brown, mid-century modern wooden sideboard with a single door, two drawers, and tapered legs. The cabinet features clean lines, visible wood grain, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a single vertical door on the left and two horizontal drawers on the right, with integrated handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid, uninterrupted wooden panel and one of the tapered legs.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, flat wooden back with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing a solid wooden panel and a tapered leg.
